---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in AMOS
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Python version:** (e.g. 3.11)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 120)
- **AMOS version / commit:** (e.g. `git rev-parse --short HEAD`)

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste relevant logs or screenshots.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
